name: Anna Maria Alberghetti
abstract: Anna Maria Alberghetti (Italian: [ˈanna maˈriːa alberˈɡetti]; born May 15, 1936) is an American actress and soprano. Alberghetti sang in concert from the time she was a child and performed at Carnegie Hall at age 13.

works.t: Les soirées musicales: 6. La pastorella dell'Alpi, "Son bella pastorella"
Il barbiere di Siviglia: Act I, Scene 2. Una voce poco fa
Aria and Variations, "Deh, torna, mio bene", Op. 164
La molinara: Act II. Nel cor più non mi sento
The Magic Flute, K. 620: Act II, Scene 3. Der hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: I went over once with Anna Marie Alberghetti and we did this show with Bob Hope overseas
